query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS dev_product_tags (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  projectId INT NOT NULL,
  asin VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,
  dimensionName VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL COMMENT '属性维度名称',
  dimensionValue VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL COMMENT '属性值',
  source ENUM('ai', 'manual', 'specification') DEFAULT 'ai' COMMENT '标签来源',
  confirmed INT DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '是否已确认',
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  KEY idx_project_asin (projectId, asin),
  KEY idx_project_dimension (projectId, dimensionName)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS dev_product_tags (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  projectId INT NOT NULL,
  asin VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,
  dimensionName VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL COMMENT '属性维度名称',
  dimensionValue VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL COMMENT '属性值',
  source ENUM('ai', 'manual', 'specification') DEFAULT 'ai' COMMENT '标签来源',
  confirmed INT DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '是否已确认',
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  KEY idx_project_asin (projectId, asin),
  KEY idx_project_dimension (projectId, dimensionName)
);
